mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM STORE_INVENTORIES WHERE STORE_INVENTORY_ID IN
#{storeInventoryId}

SELECT STORE_INVENTORY_ID AS inventoryId , I.CURRENT_QUANTITY , I.SAFETY_QUANTITY , I.CREATED_AT , I.UPDATED_AT , S.STORE_NAME , M.MATERIAL_NAME , STORE_ID , MATERIAL_ID FROM STORE_INVENTORIES I JOIN MATERIALS M USING (MATERIAL_ID) JOIN STORES S USING (STORE_ID) WHERE STORE_INVENTORY_ID = #{storeInventoryId}
